selections.name: Hellavalegacy
selections.reason: Strong 2nd last start on soft ground, draws well in barrier 3 for this tight sprint and looks ready to peak.

selections.name: Cool Nanczye
selections.reason: Resuming but has placed on soft previously and can run well fresh despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Boomtime Now
selections.reason: Placed 3rd last start, fit and handles the conditions well enough to feature in the finish.

selections.name: Barrieanna
selections.reason: Solid 3rd last start, has placed on wet tracks before and gets a favorable inside draw.

danger_horse.name: Eezitosort
danger_horse.reason: Resuming with solid trial form, could surprise if ready to go.

selections.name: Zougo Boss
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd on soft going last start, draws the inside rail and gets a late rider upgrade.

selections.name: Off The Scale
selections.reason: Won on soft ground two starts back and has the class to bounce back from a poor last run.

selections.name: Flash Prince
selections.reason: Good wet track record and won recently, handles the distance perfectly.

selections.name: More Cash
selections.reason: Comes off a win last start and has proven ability on wet tracks.

danger_horse.name: Release Point
danger_horse.reason: Has placed multiple times on wet ground and can improve second-up.

selections.name: Zamalek
selections.reason: Finished 3rd on soft ground last start, draws well and looks the most reliable in a weak field.

selections.name: Pinero
selections.reason: Solid 4th on soft ground last time out, should be competitive here.

selections.name: Durness
selections.reason: Finished 4th last start and has room to improve second-up.

selections.name: The Confidante
selections.reason: Needs to improve but faces a very weak field and could sneak into the placings.

danger_horse.name: Gregoly
danger_horse.reason: Draws the rail and could improve off a moderate 6th last start.

selections.name: Mariota
selections.reason: Won last start, handles wet tracks well, and gets a great draw to dictate terms.

selections.name: Charlie Magic
selections.reason: Strong 3rd on soft ground last start, wide draw is a slight concern but has the ability.

selections.name: Power Of Success
selections.reason: Consistent form with a 3rd last start, handles the distance and class.

selections.name: Lesgo Don
selections.reason: Finished 4th last start, very experienced on wet tracks and draws the rail.

danger_horse.name: Externus
danger_horse.reason: Has extensive wet track experience and can bounce back from a poor run.

selections.name: Idol Bye
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd on soft ground last start, gets a late rider upgrade and draws well.

selections.name: Devilish Sun
selections.reason: Solid 3rd on soft ground last start, fit and ready to challenge.

selections.name: Rips Law
selections.reason: Has placed on soft before and gets the inside rail advantage.

selections.name: Jack The Boss
selections.reason: Finished 6th on soft last start, can improve with a better trip.

danger_horse.name: Haras
danger_horse.reason: Draws well and could show more second-up.

selections.name: Imperial State
selections.reason: Strong 3rd on soft ground last start, looks well placed in this field.

selections.name: Elusive Eagle
selections.reason: Top weight but has an excellent wet track record and draws perfectly.

selections.name: Hit Song
selections.reason: Comes off a win last start and has proven ability on wet tracks.

selections.name: Exoflow
selections.reason: Has won on soft ground previously and draws well enough to be competitive.

danger_horse.name: Irish Jig
danger_horse.reason: Finished 4th on soft last start, could feature if he overcomes the wide draw.

selections.name: Kawatiri
selections.reason: Won on soft ground last start, draws perfectly for this tight sprint.

selections.name: Zouchase
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd last start, handles the conditions and draws well.

selections.name: Super Sioux
selections.reason: Class drop and great wet track form, but must overcome a terrible wide draw.

selections.name: Prucia
selections.reason: Solid 2nd last start, should be in the mix if she handles the soft going.

danger_horse.name: Midnight Rabble
danger_horse.reason: Won last start and has placed on wet ground, late rider change is a plus.
